title: IPv6 and Modern Programmable Networks · Protocol Clinic: Net Zta Sase Sse
summary: Extend the branch design for IPv6, centralized policy, overlays, zero trust, SASE, and infrastructure as code. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net zta sase sse increment in a dual-stack and programmable-network transition plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Relate zero-trust policy decisions, least privilege, continuous context, SASE, and SSE service boundaries.
Explain SDN control separation, SD-WAN policy and transport abstraction, and VXLAN overlay identifiers and use cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
